pages.text: Oh deadly Greencough... Back in the days so many cats died from it. Greencough is a usually mortal chest infection obtained from a very cold and damp weather, mostly during Leaf-bare.$(br2)Greencough will make a cat weaken through time until they can't fight the infection anymore. It is critical to treat it in time before it spreads and becomes an even worse threat.$(br)
pages.title: Greencough
Greencough
pages.text: Greencough can only be treated using Catmint Leaves, these are known to be the best remedy for Greencough. Simply make a cat eat them and they will help fight the infection. It is important to treat Greencough as soon as possible before it spreads to other cats and possibly take lives.$(br)
